Executive Summary:
• 	Now I just want to cover the what of Product Launch Formula, just a quick
roadmap of the course and what you'll learn in Product Launch Formula, and where
you’re going to learn it in the program
• 	This is a big program, there's a lot here, but remember - it's all about the baby
steps. It's about moving forward in the direction you're going to. You start off with
small successes and you build them.
• 	You don't need to do it all, you don't need to do every single type of launch, you
don't have to do every single piece. The model is so powerful that you can get 20% of
it right and you're still going to win. You don't have to get it all right or all perfect, I
make mistakes in every single launch I do. But it doesn't matter because the model
is so redundant, and so powerful, and so strong, that it's going to end up working for
you.
• 	Your Path through PLF is all laid out for you on your dashboard - start at the top
and work your way down the page.
• 	Watch the case studies for inspiration
• 	Define your Niche in Stage 1
• 	Then, in Stage 2 - Start building your list
• 	Stage 3 is where you dive into the Core Foundation of PLF…Here’ you’ll find
Modules 1 and 2
• 	Module 1: This is where you’ll get the core strategies and tactics - this is what
makes PLF work. The core work applies to all types of launches. You’ll go through
some exercises as well, and can apply this to all your launches.
• 	Module 2: We take the work from Module 1 and begin to develop your Launch
Theme and Launch Story. We dig into your P.S. Path, a critical piece of your launch.
We’ll also cover the Business Launch Formula and a lot of the tools we use.
• 	In Stage 4, you start to create your product and that’s where you’ll find Module 3:
Here we cover the Seed Launch. The Seed Launch is perfect for people that don’t
have a product or list (or just creating a new one), and it’s awesome because you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

GETTING STARTED –PLF Roadmap (PLF CORE)
3
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
literally get paid to create your product.
• 	Then comes Stage 5 where it’s Launch Time! Here we cover the Quick Launch which
is great if you already have a product and offer, but you want a quick infusion of
money.
• 	Module 4: The Internal Launch - this is the classic sideways sales letter style
launch that’s specifically to your list. They’re fun to do and you have complete
control over all the aspects. We also go deep into creating prelaunch content in this
module.
• 	Module 5: This is where I go deep into breaking down actual pre-launch videos
from my students. I show you exactly what’s right and wrong in each of these videos
- one of my personal favorite modules.
• 	Module 6: Here we go over sales videos, and I’ll again take real sales videos and go
through them individually.
• 	Then once you’ve launched, you can head into Stage 6 – Launch Pro - where we’ll
cover JV launches which are very exciting.
• 	Module 7: Surprise! This is a special bonus module all about the Evergreen
launch. Once you’ve created your launch you can begin to automate PLF year-round
for your business, and you can re-use the material from your previous modules.
• 	Overall, we start with simple, core work. As we nail that down we move into the
details and how it applies to your actual launch.
• 	You have access to the Launch Your List bonus course right away, and you’ll get
access to the Product Creation Course a bit later.
• 	Community is key -leave a comment on this video and tell me, what’s your path
through PLF going to look like?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

TRANSCRIPT:
OK, so now I just want to cover the what of Product Launch Formula, just a
quick roadmap of the course and what you'll learn and where within Product Launch
Formula. This is a big program because there's only one way I know how
to teach, and that's to give you everything. It is a lot, there's a lot here but
just remember, one of my favorite things -- you're going to hear me say this a lot --
it's all about the baby steps. It's about taking steps, moving forward in the
direction you're going to. No one jumps to a million-dollar launch overnight; it just
doesn't happen. You start off with small successes and you build them.
It's just like a baby, they take that first step and they fall down, but they get up
and try to take another attempt, and they fall down. But eventually they put a couple
steps together and sooner or later they're walking. Every baby learns to walk and if
you just take the baby steps and just keep moving forward in this program, you'll
have that same experience. It will work for you.
You don't need to do it all, you don't need to do every single type of launch,
you don't have to do every single piece. The model is so powerful that you can get
20% of it right and you're still going to win. You don't have to get it all right or all
perfect, I make mistakes in every single launch I do. But it doesn't matter because the
model is so redundant, and so powerful, and so strong, that it's going to end up
working for you.
Let's walk through the modules.
Module 1 is basically the core strategies and tactics. What I cover in
here is what makes the whole thing tick, what makes Product Launch Formula work.
If you only go through this one module, then you win and you win forever. You will
change your results forever. You'll need to do the core work in here and I've got some
actual exercises in here but you will use them in all of your launches going forward.
So the core work that you're doing in module 1 works for all your launches, no matter
whether they're Seed Launches or JV Launches or quick launches or Internal Launch,
doesn't matter. The core work is going to continue to work for you as you move
forward.
And the core exercises, you might change businesses, you might radically
change your business model, but you can still go back to the work or exercise that you
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
did in module one. Go through it all again and you're going to be set up for a launch
all over again. This is where you learn to connect with your market to create great
offers and a great prelaunch, and really develop the core ingredients of your launch.
So module one, that sounded pretty cool right? Pretty big right?
Module 2 we take it to the next step. We take the work you did in
module 1 and we start to develop your launch theme and your launch
story. We'll go deep into what I call the ‘PS path,’ which is how you deliver huge
value and still make the sale. It's how you avoid giving away the farm, giving away
everything and giving away just the right amount of money, right amount of content
so it leads into the sale and then you make the money. So it's a key piece.
So module 1 and module 2 are a lot of the core strategy and tactics again, you
come out of that and then work you do in those two modules will set you up going
forward. Now from there on out is where we actually take it and start to drop it into
your launches.
In module 3, we cover the Seed Launch and the Quick Launch.
Now the Seed Launch is great if you have no list and no product. It's a
beautiful thing because you basically, you get paid to create your product. I love it.
That's how I did my first launch for when I first rolled out Product Launch Formula.
When I first started teaching product launches, I did it as a Seed Launch. I
started off with six sales and it grew up into this huge business that I've got today, it's
been amazing. The Quick Launch is great if you've already got a business
and an offer, but you just want a quick pop of money. This is the easiest
and quickest launch - that's the quick launch. I did it once to pay my taxes, I did it
once to finish my basement - it’s a great way to bring in money quick.
One thing I forgot to mention about that Seed Launch is it's great to get
started if you have no list and no product. But say you already have an existing
business and you want to come out with a new product, but you just can't seem to get
yourself to put in the time to create the product - it’s great for that too.
Now module 4, the big focus of module 4 is on the Internal
Launch. The Internal Launch is basically the classic Sideways Sales LetterTM launch
with the three pieces of content, plus the sales letter/video, but it's just a launch to
your existing list. I love Internal Launches, they're the most elegant launches in my
opinion. They're fun to do, you have complete control over every aspect, it's fantastic.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

It's a logical next step after you do the Seed Launch to go to do an Internal Launch.
We also go deep into creating Prelaunch Content in module 4 and the great
thing about this module is this is where we start to get into really high leverage
because those Internal Launches are high leverage launches.
And also I'll go deep into some of the Launch List, how you create a launch
list, how you manage the Launch List - we’ll go deep into Launch List secrets in
module 4.
Now module 5, which is the best module ever. I love this module
because this is where I go deep into breaking down Prelaunch Content
videos. This is probably the best teaching I have ever done.
I'll actually walk you through prelaunch videos from some of my students and
you get to actually see their videos, and then I'll stop the videos and I say, "Oh look at
what they did here, this is awesome. This is really great; this is where you - look at
how he established authority here. Look at this is reciprocity here, look how he did
this. Oh he missed this, this is where he screwed up here," it's fantastic. It’s just real
world stuff. You're going to love it.
Module 6, well it might even be better than module 5 because it's
all about creating sales videos. I do the same thing that I did back in module 5
where I'll actually take real sales videos and I'll break them down for you. I will do a
stop action where we'll go through and we'll talk about each piece and what exactly is
happening and how the structure goes together. It's fantastic.
Plus in module 6, I'm going to cover JV Launches. That's where you get other
people mailing about your launch, and these are the highest leverage launches there
are. This is like an analogy I love - when you've got a roaring fire going and it's
pouring gasoline on that fire. That's what JV Launches do.
And then module 7, which I didn't even tell you about, that's a
complete bonus module and module 7's all about the Evergreen Launch.
And an Evergreen Launch is basically once you've done work and created that
Internal Launch or that JV Launch, then you can build a system so that every time a
new lead comes into your business, they end up going through your Evergreen
Launch.
Basically you have the power of PLF, but you have it going all year round for

you every time you get new leads. The beautiful thing about evergreen is you
get to reuse the material from your other launches. This is really advanced
stuff, not everyone's going to do this, not everyone's going to get there with the
evergreen launches but that bonus module's all about evergreen. Basically the layout
is we start simple but big with important core work that's going to carry through all
of the modules, and all of your launches, and all of your work.
And then we added more details after you get that core in place. Plus, I've got
plenty of other bonuses and goodies. You already have access to the Launch Your List
Course. Around module 5 or 6, we'll release the Product Creation Course for you so
you'll have that in place as well.
The one thing I've learned as I went through this is how to avoid
overwhelming people with too much at once. That's why we've really carefully
sequenced this out - we start with the core strategy and then we add in more as you
go forward.
If you're just starting out, module 1 and 2 are absolutely critical for you, and
then you're going to really go after that Seed Launch in module 3.
If you already have a business, then module 1 and 2 will probably give you an
entirely new way to look at your business that's going to translate into: more money,
more growth, better positioning, and list growth. Then you may possibly want to look
at a Quick Launch in module 3, because then you can make a bunch of money back
really quick.
Or you might just want to focus on the Internal Launch. Then of course the
JV Launch is just going to blow things up really big for you, and the Evergreen
Launch is really awesome if you end up putting that in place.
So remember it's about baby steps, you don't have to watch every single video.
I mean it would be awesome if you did but you don't have to do every exercise. But
get in there, put in the work and get this right. You don't have to get everything right,
you just have to get that 20% right and it will kill it for you.
So remember, community is key so as part of your practice in bringing your
biggest game to Product Launch Formula, scroll down and leave a comment for me
and tell me where you're going to go with this.
